behavior_summary: Provides the in-game behavior for a lava object: when a player 'looks' at the lava it reports a short description ('molten rock ').

Separately, a coroutine (helper) drives the lava object's visual/audio lifecycle across ticks: it reads and advances the animation frame, periodically spawns a small auxiliary effect (FREE::1C19) with variant bytes, and destroys the lava item when the animation reaches a terminal frame.
The coroutine uses suspend points so its loop runs over multiple engine ticks and uses small-byte locals as timing/variant markers to choose when to spawn effects and how to step frames.
notable_control_flow: U8P_LAVA::LAVA::look: on Event 0 (examine/U8P_LAVA::look) calls Item::bark with the literal 'molten rock ' and then suspends once before returning. (high)

U8P_LAVA::LAVA::00AF: runs as a coroutine (multi-tick). It initially spawns FREE::1C19 once, then loops: getFrame -> adjust local frame counter -> setFrame -> conditionally spawn FREE::1C19 with a byte variant -> suspend and repeat. When a terminal frame condition is reached it calls Item::destroy. (high)
Timing/variant decisions are driven by byte local [BP-04h] and a boolean flag [BP-05h], which select different byte constants (0x07, 0x20, 0x2D) and different frame progression behavior. (medium)
open_questions: What exact visual/sound effect FREE::1C19 produces (spawn inferred as particle/sound). (low)
Precise frame index values and which frame is considered 'terminal' are not shown in the excerpt; exact thresholds are inferred from comparisons but not concretely named. (medium)
How and where the coroutine U8P_LAVA::LAVA::00AF is started in the game world (trigger or spawn by other code) is not present in the excerpt. (medium)

main_function.name: U8P_LAVA::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_LAVA::look' (examine) event for the lava item by emitting a short description ('molten rock ') so the player sees that text.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (player/actor performs 'U8P_LAVA::look' or examine on the lava item).

function_map.name: U8P_LAVA::look
function_map.role: Show a short description when the lava is examined (calls Item::bark with 'molten rock ').

function_map.name: U8P_LAVA::00AF
function_map.role: Coroutine managing the lava item's animation lifecycle: reads/sets frames, spawns periodic effects (FREE::1C19), and destroys the item at animation end.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine routine to emit/display a textual message from an item/process. Called by LAVA::look to present 'molten rock '.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Read the current animation/frame index for an item (used by the coroutine).

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Set the item's animation/frame index (used to advance or rewind animation).

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawn an auxiliary transient effect (likely sound/particle). Spawned by the lava coroutine with pid and a small variant byte plus a 0 argument.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove/destroy the item from the world when the animation lifecycle completes.

internal_calls.purpose: Runs across multiple ticks using suspend points; not invoked directly by LAVA::look in the provided excerpt — appears started/managed by the engine or other code. (medium)

external_calls.purpose: Deliver the short description string 'molten rock ' to be presented to the player. Arguments: item (pid) and char* string. (high)
Read the current animation/frame index into local [BP-02h] to decide progression. (high)
Write updated animation/frame index back to the item after increment/decrement logic. (high)
Spawn a transient effect periodically during the coroutine's loop; passed the owner's pid and a small byte variant from [BP-04h]. (medium)
Remove the lava item when the animation reaches its terminal frame/condition. (high)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the in-game behavior for a lava object: when a player 'looks' at the lava it reports a short description ('molten rock ').
